text:

Log:

  Don't delete usr/share/local/kk_KZ.UTF-8 with "make delete-old" after r302329

  kk_KZ.UTF-8 was originally removed in r290494, but restored as an alias to
  en_US.UTF-8 in r302329

  Approved by: re (kib)
  PR: 211046
